properties.name: aws.s3.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key ID for S3 and other AWS services.

properties.name: aws.s3.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret access key for S3 and other AWS services.

properties.name: aws.s3.bucket-name
properties.description: S3 bucket name for storing candidate files.

properties.name: aws.s3.photo-prefix
properties.description: S3 key prefix for candidate photo uploads.

properties.name: aws.s3.document-prefix
properties.description: S3 key prefix for candidate document uploads.

properties.name: aws.s3.video-prefix
properties.description: S3 key prefix for candidate video uploads.

properties.name: aws.secret.name
properties.description: AWS Secrets Manager secret name for DB credentials.

properties.name: aws.bedrock.region
properties.description: AWS region for Bedrock AI service.

properties.name: aws.bedrock.model-id
properties.description: Bedrock model ID for AI agent (e.g. Claude 3 Sonnet).

properties.name: google.oauth2.clientId
properties.description: Google OAuth2 client ID for Gmail SMTP authentication.

properties.name: google.oauth2.clientSecret
properties.description: Google OAuth2 client secret for Gmail SMTP authentication.

properties.name: google.oauth2.refreshToken
properties.description: Google OAuth2 refresh token for Gmail SMTP authentication.
